category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Sao Tome and Principe.

target_market_label.en: Sao Tome and Principe (no NSB / EMAE)
target_market_label.zh: 圣多美和普林西比（无标准机构 / EMAE）
target_market_label.zht: 聖多美和普林西比（無標準機構 / EMAE）

title.en: China-to-Sao Tome and Principe EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入圣多美和普林西比：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入聖多美和普林西比：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Sao Tome and Principe's practical requirements: EMAE grid connection on 230/400 V 50 Hz, IEC 61851 and IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 expectations, coastal humidity and salt-mist durability, OCPP and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, sea-freight logistics, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与圣多美和普林西比实务要求的差距对照：EMAE 230/400 V 50 Hz电网接入、IEC 61851及IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2预期、沿海湿热和盐雾耐久、OCPP及IEC 61000 EMC证据、海运物流，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與聖多美和普林西比實務要求的差距對照：EMAE 230/400 V 50 Hz電網接入、IEC 61851及IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2預期、沿海濕熱和鹽霧耐久、OCPP及IEC 61000 EMC證據、海運物流，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線。

answer_first.en: Sao Tome and Principe has no clearly confirmed strong national standards body or EVSE-specific mandatory certification route as of 2026-06-14, so exporters should treat this as a project-by-project IEC evidence market. The practical gaps for China-made EV chargers are EMAE grid acceptance on 230/400 V 50 Hz, IEC 61851 safety evidence, IEC 62196 Type 2 AC and CCS2 DC connector design, IEC 61000 EMC documentation, OCPP readiness where networked operation is specified, coastal salt-mist and humidity derating, and sea-freight spare-parts planning. China domestic GB/T 20234 connectors and GB/T 27930 DC communication are not accepted substitutes for Type 2 / CCS2 deployments.
answer_first.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未能确认圣多美和普林西比存在强有力的国家标准机构或专门适用于EVSE的强制认证路径，因此出口商应将其视为按项目核验IEC证据的市场。中国制造充电桩的实务差距包括：EMAE 230/400 V 50 Hz电网接入验收、IEC 61851安全证据、IEC 62196 Type 2交流及CCS2直流接口设计、IEC 61000 EMC文件、在要求联网运营时的OCPP能力、沿海盐雾和湿热降额，以及海运备件计划。中国国内GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通信不能替代Type 2 / CCS2部署。
answer_first.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未能確認聖多美和普林西比存在強有力的國家標準機構或專門適用於EVSE的強制認證路徑，因此出口商應將其視為按項目核驗IEC證據的市場。中國製造充電樁的實務差距包括：EMAE 230/400 V 50 Hz電網接入驗收、IEC 61851安全證據、IEC 62196 Type 2交流及CCS2直流接口設計、IEC 61000 EMC文件、在要求聯網運營時的OCPP能力、沿海鹽霧和濕熱降額，以及海運備件計劃。中國國內GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通訊不能替代Type 2 / CCS2部署。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, EMAE approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Sao Tome and Principe import, electrical, utility-connection, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、EMAE批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验圣多美和普林西比现行进口、电气、公用事业接入和项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、EMAE批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗聖多美和普林西比現行進口、電氣、公用事業接入和項目要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
